name: comprehensive-backend-logging
title: feat(logging): 后端全链路日志覆盖 — 命令/DB/后台/转发零遗漏
description: 系统性补齐后端所有日志盲区: 69 个 tauri 命令入口/错误, db.rs 60 处 map_err, price_sync/codex/manual_budget/estimate 后台模块, proxy 剩余路径(mock/resolve_group/server bind), 统一分级策略(entry=debug, path=info, body=debug, error=warn/error), 全部输出终端
creator: nico
